command:
echo '== MORENO-AI REPO LOCATION AND RUNTIME ==' 
find /home/jose -name 'moreno-delegate' 2>/dev/null
find /home/jose -name 'delegator*.py' 2>/dev/null  
ls /home/jose/.local/bin/ 2>/dev/null
echo '== GIT LOG =='
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai && git log --oneline -5
echo '== RUNTIME REGISTRY =='
cat /home/jose/moreno-ai/runtime_registry.yaml 2>/dev/null | head -40
echo '== GOVERNANCE =='
ls /home/jose/moreno-ai/governance/ 2>/dev/null
echo '== MEMORY EXECUTION PIPELINE =='
ls /home/jose/moreno-ai/memory/execution-pipeline/ 2>/dev/null | head -20
echo DONE_1865
